text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'll cast my very best spell, just for you! 
Every princess needs a witch, after all.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Magic for a princess! Wait, are you about to 
summon a pumpkin carriage?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Heh, then you just need a nice dress, 
and you'll be set.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
My magic isn't for summoning things 
or other mundane tricks like that! 
It's reserved for more noble goals.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Noble… So like turning her 
into the ideal princess?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ooh… a princess with the nobility 
and strength to knock down everything 
that stands in my way?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well, I do hope to someday obtain the strength 
to tame a wild lion with a stare, or to hold up
a falling tree with one finger…

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But a true princess has to grow stronger 
through her own efforts! I can't let magic 
do all the work!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A w-wild lion?! A falling tree?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to see what kind of training 
that entails…
